# kb2 PORTFOLIO — generated 2026-03-31 00:36

--- portfolio-overview ---
Intent tags: full_analysis, rebalance
The portfolio holds 5 positions: AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, SPY, TLT. Annualised return is 15.66 percent, annualised volatility 18.07 percent (high risk). 21-day rolling volatility is 15.12 percent. Sharpe ratio 0.59, Sortino ratio 0.87 (risk-free rate 5 percent). Maximum drawdown -15.69 percent. Beta vs S&P 500: 0.87.

--- portfolio-risk ---
Intent tags: full_analysis
95 percent daily VaR: 1.63 percent (on 95 percent of days, loss will not exceed this level). 99 percent VaR: 3.24 percent. Herfindahl-Hirschman Index (HHI): 0.2250 — well diversified (equal-weight benchmark: 0.2000). Return distribution is positively skewed — occasional large gains (skewness 1.85), with leptokurtic — fatter tails than normal, extreme moves more likely (excess kurtosis 19.69).

--- portfolio-correlation ---
Intent tags: full_analysis, rebalance
Pairwise correlations (all pairs): NVDA-SPY (+0.78); AAPL-SPY (+0.76); MSFT-SPY (+0.62); MSFT-NVDA (+0.56); AAPL-NVDA (+0.53); AAPL-MSFT (+0.39); SPY-TLT (+0.16); AAPL-TLT (+0.10); MSFT-TLT (+0.05); NVDA-TLT (+0.01). Highly correlated pairs (correlation above 0.70): NVDA-SPY (+0.78); AAPL-SPY (+0.76). High positive correlation means assets move in lockstep, reducing effective diversification.

--- portfolio-risk-contributions ---
Intent tags: full_analysis
Risk contribution (share of total portfolio volatility): NVDA contributes 39.9 percent of total portfolio volatility; MSFT contributes 29 percent of total portfolio volatility; SPY contributes 14.1 percent of total portfolio volatility; AAPL contributes 12.1 percent of total portfolio volatility; TLT contributes 4.9 percent of total portfolio volatility. A position with a small weight but high risk contribution is disproportionately driving portfolio volatility.
